expo_start.description: Start the Expo React Native local server for preview testing.

ios_build.description: Trigger an EAS cloud build for iOS Simulator.

lint.description: Check syntax and Vibe Coding strictness.

rules: Strictly follow Apple HIG rules for touch zones (44x44pt minimum)
Use zustand for state. NO local state unless absolutely strictly isolated.
Use nativewind for all styling. No Magic Numbers.
Map and Bottom sheet must interact seamlessly on the UI thread via reanimated.
